card_name_verified: Wyndham Rewards Earner® Business Card (Barclays, $95 AF)
_review_reason: All recurring benefits points-denominated or qualitative — no USD statement credits. Specifically: 15,000 anniversary bonus points (points), 45k SUB (one-time), automatic Wyndham Diamond status (qualitative), 10% fewer points for go-free awards (% discount, not credit), no FX fees (qualitative). Note: 15k anniversary points is points-based not FNA-cert, so doesn't qualify for the FNA-include rule.
_excluded: 10% go-free discount (% discount, not USD credit)
